title: TVK banner obscures police outpost signboard in Coimbatore, taken down after criticism
content: The issue drew criticism on social media and among members of the public, following which the banner was removed on Thursday

title: Raut seeks action against rebel MP Sanjay Patil over 'threats'; Fadnavis says police will act
content: Responding to the spat between the two leaders, Devendra Fadnavis said no one should be intimidated by threats and asserted that the state would not tolerate any such acts

title: Chennai’s Dr Priya Selvaraj on surviving a crevasse fall and summiting Mount Everest
content: Dr Priya Selvaraj trained for four months to summit Mount Everest. The daunting climb there and back, scaling the highest mountain in the world at 8,848.86 metres, taught her many lessons and even had her fighting for her life. Back in Chennai, this granddaughter of legendary actor Gemini Ganesan, recounts the gritty details of her journey

title: Former director of medical education in Karnataka Dr. N. Rajeeva Shetty passes away in Bengaluru
content: Dr. Rajeeva Shetty made significant contributions to dental education, research, and healthcare administration

title: I prefer solutions over disputes, says Telangana CM on river water sharing issues with Karnataka and AP
content: Central Govt decides to constitute a high level committee to resolve water sharing problems between the three southern States — Telangana, Andhra Pradesh and Karnataka

title: Jaishankar calls for closer cooperation with South Korea at Jeju Forum
content: Mr. Jaishankar also called for “greater capacity and opportunities” for the Global South to create new factors of growth, while highlighting that “the interests of a few” nations are being “openly prioritised” - without naming any country

title: Money laundering case: Actor Jacqueline Fernandez withdraws plea from Supreme Court
content: Jacqueline Fernandez, who was was summoned by the ED several times in connection with the probe, was named an accused for the first time in a supplementary charge sheet filed by the agency

title: UDF government’s stance on PM SHRI unconstitutional
content: The MoU was entered into by the Secretary, Education Department, Government of Kerala, and the Additional Secretary, Department of Education, Government of India, and not in the name of the President and the Governor as mandated under Article 299. Hence, the said MoU is a nullity

title: Explained | Why NMC is phasing out PG diploma medical courses from 2027
content: The National Medical Commission has directed medical colleges offering PG diploma courses to apply for conversion of those seats into MD/MS broad-specialty degree seats; this move is the culmination of a policy shift that has been under way for nearly two decades

title: In major organisational rejig, BJP announces new office bearers in Uttar Pradesh
content: According to the list issued by State BJP president Pankaj Chaudhary, the party has appointed 19 vice-presidents and eight general secretaries. Nineteen State Ministers have also been appointed as office bearers

title: New gates of Tungabhadra dam inaugurated, three States vow to protect interests of farmers
content: Mr. Shivakumar said the three States discussed key concerns raised by farmers, including the proposed Navali balancing reservoir, and the need to remove accumulated silt from the reservoir to improve water conservation and storage

title: Who is Jagadish Palaniswamy? A look at Tamil Nadu CM Vijay’s close aide and Private Secretary
content: Palanisamy, Vijay’s close aide, film producer, and the head of a talent management company, was appointed as Private Secretary to the Chief Minister

title: How a gate failure reshaped safety planning at Tungabhadra dam in Karnataka
content: What began as a sudden structural failure in one bay of the historic reservoir soon grew into a much wider concern over the health of the entire gate system at one of south India’s most important inter-State irrigation projects

title: Thiruvananthapuram Corporation witnesses high drama as LDF steps up protest; Mayor injured
content: Minor scuffle breaks out between LDF and BJP councillors as LDF councillors block Mayor V.V. Rajesh from entering the office. LDF councillors have demanded removal of BJP councillor R. Sugathan arrested under KAAPA

title: Politically-patronised private investment crowding out broad-based private investment: Congress
content: Congress general secretary Jairam Ramesh also alleged that they are now witnessing "politically-patronised" private investment itself crowding out broad-based private investment

title: CMRL pay-off case: Ex-Kerala CM Pinarayi’s daughter Veena appears before ED again
content: Questioning is after Enforcement Directorate on Wednesday obtained copies of 134 documents collected by Serious Fraud Investigation Office in connection with the case

title: Maharashtra Assembly: Opposition raises Mumbai local train murder; Speaker asks govt. to make statement
content: Congress MLA Nana Patole termed the incident “extremely serious” and said it concerned the safety of ordinary citizens travelling on Mumbai’s suburban rail network that ferries nearly 80 lakh commuters every day

title: Lionel Messi’s 39th birthday celebrations in Bengal’s Ichhapur
content: A priest, a life sized statue, a 39-pound cake and a tea seller’s lifelong devotion. Inside Lionel Messi’s annual birthday celebrations in West Bengal’s Ichhapur

title: SIR exercise begins in Telangana; BLOs visit houses to distribute Enumeration Forms
content: People can search for their name in voters list through Chief Electoral Officer (CEO) Telangana website (https://ceotelangana.nic.in/)

title: NEET: Beyond paper leaks, the real vulnerabilities lie elsewhere | Explained
content: While extraordinary security measures may safeguard printed question papers, deeper risks arising from institutional blind spots, insider networks, and powerful commercial interests remain largely unaddressed

title: Why Vaibhav Sooryvanshi can’t share Team India’s dressing room in England?
content: Sachin Tendulkar could. Vaibhav Suryavanshi can’t. Here’s why the ECB rules changed the safeguarding regulations

title: Fiancee or lover: Who pushed Ketan Agarwal off the cliff
content: Police are examining forensic evidence to determine whether the fatal shove was administered by Siya Goyal or her lover; Mr. Chaudhary’s decision to wear a hoodie on a hot day roused police suspicions

title: Watch: Pune fort murder: Police allege Fiancée, lover pushed man into gorge
content: What was first reported as an accidental fall at Pune’s Lohagad Fort has now turned into a murder investigation

title: India, U.S. note ‘substantial progress’ on trade deal talks as U.S. Trade Representative Greer ends two-day visit to Delhi
content: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer held multiple meetings with Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal; however, the two sides have not yet been able to announce a deadline by which the trade deals will be finalised

title: Former IAS officer Sujata Rout Karthikeyan joins Biju Janata Dal
content: Former Odisha CM Naveen Patnaik asserts that he would lead the party in next elections, putting to rest the succession debate in the regional party

title: Auto driver stabbed to death in Kalaburagi
content: He had got into an argument with a group of youths who were consuming alcohol at a roadside eatery where he had stopped for food

title: Behind ‘Son of Thanjai’, the Tamil game that promises to revolutionise Indian gaming
content: Writer-lyricist Madhan Karky and Ayelet Studio head Abraham K take us through the making of their historical open-world game and speak about the challenges of making a rooted Tamil game with international appeal

title: College student ends life in hostel in Kalaburagi district
content: According to preliminary reports, she had been staying in a separate room in the hostel due to health issues

title: NIA arrests local political leader over SIR-related violence in West Bengal
content: Sayem Chowdhary alias Babu Chowdhary, a political leader from Mothbari (Malda), was taken into custody by an NIA team after he was questioned at the agency's branch office in Kolkata, an NIA statement said.

title: Congress leader V.M. Sudheeran questions Kerala UDF govt’s tax cut on low-alcohol beverages
content: Sudheeran says proposal should have been discussed within party and UDF before the Revised Budget; urges government to drop tax cut provision

title: Kerala liquor tax row: CPI(M) accuses CM Satheesan of making ‘incorrect’ statements, seeks clarification
content: M.B. Rajesh rejects Satheesan’s claim in Assembly that the proposal originated during previous LDF government’s tenure when current CPI(M) State secretary M.V. Govindan held Excise portfolio

title: Why Kerala’s low-alcohol liquor policy has sparked a political storm | Explained
content: Kerala government’s decision to allow sale and production of low-alcohol beverages by fixing a sales tax for low-alcohol liquor under two different tax brackets has snowballed into a major controversy with allegations of corruption

title: What are Indian farmers’ concerns over impacts of India-U.S. BTA | Explained
content: The farmer groups are yet again at the forefront to express their anguish through demonstrations, events and protests as USTR Greer concludes his visit following meetings with Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal

title: BJP backs NCERT's move to include ‘Emergency’ chapter in Class 9 textbook
content: The newly developed social science textbook describes Emergency as "one of the major challenges" to democracy in India and one in which a majority of fundamental rights were suspended

title: All 33 new crest gates on Tungabhadra Dam to be dedicated to the nation on June 25
content: The inauguration ceremony, scheduled for 11 a.m., will take place at the Government High School Ground in Munirabad, Koppal district

title: Grow better onion varieties, boost horticulture: Chandrababu Naidu to Kurnool officials
content: The Chief Minister, reviewing development work after opening the Jonnagiri gold mine, told officials to push improved onion varieties and wider horticulture in Kurnool

title: From collapse to comeback: Tungabhadra dam in Karnataka gets new lease of life
content: Nearly two years after Gate No. 19 was washed away, the historic reservoir stands renewed with all 33 crest gates replaced; it is set to be inaugurated by month-end

title: Bus travel for women: Which States offer it free and how to avail?
content: Free bus travel for women is a move aimed towards increasing mobility, while on-ground challenges remain

title: FSSAI licence suspended, Zayaka Food Court in Kondapur ordered to shut as inspections uncover hygiene violations
content: Food safety violations were uncovered during inspections at Vijetha Supermarket Private Limited in Tellapur and  Protein Chef in Madhapur

title: Army commanding officer, soldiers booked for 'assaulting' police personnel at Jammu and Kashmir's Kishtwar station
content: According to officials, the incident occurred after a police party intercepted and seized a private vehicle owned by an Army official for alleged traffic violations

title: VCK wants CM Vijay to reconsider gold ring scheme
content: Vijay’s remarks in the Assembly, in which he appeared to mock the electoral loss of former CM Stalin in Kolathur, were not “befitting the dignity associated with the office of the Chief Minister”, says Thirumavalavan

title: One-gram gold ring for babies born in Tamil Nadu government hospitals
content: Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay will inaugurate the initiative on September 15, the birth anniversary of former Chief Minister C.N. Annadurai

title: Nara Lokesh launches shoot of Nandamuri Balakrishna’s 112th film ‘NBK112’ at Amaravati
content: The first film to pair Mr. Balakrishna and Koratala Siva, scored by Anirudh Ravichander, went on the floors near the State capital

title: Symbolism or substance? Tamil Nadu’s public health professionals question gold ring scheme
content: The gold ring may be intended as a celebration of birth, but for many within the public health sector, the more pressing need is investment in the workforce and infrastructure that makes safe deliveries possible, say health officials and doctors

title: Complaint lodged against T.N. Higher Education Minister Viswanathan for touching girl athletes’ legs
content: According to the complaint loged by Saranya Natarajan of the DMK’s legal wing, Mr. Viswanathan engaged in “deliberate, uninvited, and inappropriate” physical contact with schoolgirl athletes during an event

title: Kolkata warehouse tragedy: Death toll climbs to nine, CM orders audit of building plans
content: The West Bengal Chief Minister said that an FIR has been registered and five persons have been arrested

title: Ram temple donation row: SC asks petitioner to mention plea seeking fair probe on June 29
content: The petition has sought directions to the Centre, the Uttar Pradesh government and the Trust for constituting and operationalising such regulatory, supervisory and audit mechanisms as may be necessary to safeguard public interest and maintain the confidence of millions of devotees and donors

title: Emergency dark period which saw Indian democracy brutally crushed: PM Modi
content: We reaffirm our collective commitment to safeguarding constitutional values. Guided by the spirit of our Constitution, we will build an India that remains ever committed to justice, liberty, equality and fraternity, says PM Modi

title: Why has India-U.S. trade deal been delayed? | Explained
content: From India’s Russian oil purchases to legal battles in Washington, the road to India-U.S. trade deal has become increasingly uncertain, and The Hindu explains why

title: Emergency: The Dark Age of Indian democracy
content: From June 25, 1975 to March 21, 1977 were 21 months of uncertainty and fear triggered by the imposition of internal Emergency by the then Prime Minister Indira Gandhi. Here is a look at the mood in the country as democracy went under.

title: Road in Tambaram named after late Major Mukund Varadarajan
content: The martyr was posthumously awarded the Ashoka Chakra. The Sivakarthikeyan-starrer hit Tamil film Amaran that was released in 2024 was based on his life.

title: At Kidwai’s palliative care ward, sound therapy offers moments of comfort beyond treatment
content: Led by the Department of Pain and Palliative Medicine, this holistic programme addresses the mental health distress, anxiety, and isolation that frequently accompany advanced cancer treatment

title: 629 AEE posts in A.P. power utilities; SPDCL applications open from June 30
content: The posts span Genco, Transco and the three DISCOMs, with applications for the southern utility open from June 30 to July 27

title: ‘Felt humiliated’: How row over train door turned deadly in Mumbai local; passenger stabbed
content: A shocking act of violence unfolded on a Mumbai local train as a clothing store employee allegedly stabbed a co-passenger to death following an argument over a train door. The dispute, reportedly sparked by rain splashing passengers, escalated when the accused, feeling humiliated, repeatedly attacked the victim. Authorities apprehended the suspect in Panvel while he was attempting to flee.

title: India vs Ireland T20Is timings changed ahead of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's expected debut
content: Cricket Ireland has shifted the start times for both T20Is against India to 1:30 pm local time, an hour earlier than usual. This adjustment aims to avoid a direct clash with India's crucial Women's T20 World Cup match against Australia on June 28. Broadcasters have agreed to the revised schedule, ensuring fans can catch more of both exciting encounters.

title: Summer travel hack: How to use your credit card to save big
content: When selecting a travel credit card, you should focus on the overall value proposition instead of the headline benefits. Ideally, core benefits on travel-centric cards should be evaluated.

title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status to "Accenture-triggered wipeout" in the US market
content: Elon Musk lost his trillionaire status barely two weeks after earning it, as a tech sell-off sparked by Accenture's weak guidance wiped over $360 billion from his fortune. SpaceX shares crashed more than 30% from their June peak, while Tesla slid 5.8%, dropping Musk's net worth to $957 billion. With both stocks holding up nearly his entire wealth, the rout hit harder than any rival. A 6% SpaceX rebound could restore his trillionaire title.

title: Missiles, drones, damaged bases and depleted stockpiles: Trump faces massive Iran war bill
content: US military actions against Iran have incurred significant costs, estimated between $34 billion and $42 billion by CSIS. Congress now faces the challenge of funding these unbudgeted expenses, with the Pentagon preferring supplemental appropriations to protect modernization programs. The conflict's financial toll includes substantial spending on munitions, equipment losses, and base damage, with broader economic impacts also noted.

title: Asked about Virat, Rohit and Dhoni's absence at wedding, star pacer's reply goes viral
content: Indian pacer Akash Deep tied the knot with Akshita Raj in Varanasi, sharing joyous moments on social media.  When asked about the absence of cricket stars like Dhoni, Kohli, and Sharma, Akash humorously quipped about the potential chaos their presence might cause in Banaras.  This personal milestone follows his recovery from a recent injury that sidelined him from international and IPL action.

title: Japan’s second richest man SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son junks his plan to retire in sixties
content: SoftBank's Masayoshi Son, 68, plans to lead the tech giant for another decade, focusing intensely on artificial intelligence and robotics. Dismissing 'AI bubble' fears as 'blasphemy,' Son believes AI's potential is just unfolding. He aims to achieve 'artificial superintelligence' and is backing this vision with significant investments in companies like Arm and OpenAI, alongside robotics acquisitions.

title: PM Modi meets Amazon CEO Andy Jassy; company commits $48 bn investment in India
content: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy announced a significant $13 billion investment to boost AI and cloud infrastructure in India by 2030, bringing the total planned investment to over $21 billion. This expansion, alongside a commitment to enhancing its e-commerce network with new fulfillment centers and delivery stations, underscores Amazon's deep-rooted commitment to India's growth.

title: Neymar matches Pelé with one of Brazil's rarest World Cup feat
content: Neymar made his long-awaited World Cup return in Brazil’s 3-0 win over Scotland, becoming only the fourth Brazilian to appear at four World Cups and just the second after Pelé to wear Brazil’s iconic No. 10 shirt across four editions. The 34-year-old impressed in a brief cameo as Brazil finished top of Group C and advanced unbeaten to the Round of 32.

title: Tech millionaire Bryan Johnson says, ‘I don’t plan on dying, like actually I won’t die
content: Tech entrepreneur Bryan Johnson, 47, claims he's achieved an 18-year-old biological age and doesn't plan to die, citing advancements in biotechnology.  He advocates for radical life extension through rigorous health optimization, including strict diets and medical monitoring.  Johnson recently shared 41 accessible health hacks, emphasizing sleep, exercise, whole foods, and avoiding risky behaviors as crucial for longevity, even with his multi-million dollar anti-aging regimen.

title: Ahead of UP elections, BJP announces new team: Rajnath Singh's son among 19 vice-presidents
content: The BJP has unveiled its new Uttar Pradesh unit office-bearers, signaling a strategic move ahead of the 2027 assembly elections. Key positions including Vice Presidents, General Secretaries, Secretaries, and Regional Presidents have been filled. This reshuffle aims to bolster the party's organizational strength and campaign readiness across the state, with a focus on key leadership roles and morcha presidents.

title: NBA trade rumor: Lakers eye Cavaliers center to support Luka Doncic
content: The Los Angeles Lakers would reportedly pursue a sign-and-trade sending LeBron James to the Cleveland Cavaliers for center Jarrett Allen, ESPN's Brian Windhorst said June 24, 2026 on ESPN Cleveland radio. James, an unrestricted free agent carrying a roughly $59.5 million cap hold, made $52.6 million last season. The proposal has gained traction because Allen would address the Lakers' long-standing need at center while complementing Luka Doncic and newly re-signed Austin Reaves.

title: Ex-AAP candidate found dead in flat; family alleges murder by live-in partner
content: A 23-year-old woman's death in Rajkot has ignited accusations of murder from her family, who point to her live-in partner, Aslam Sama. Nandani Bosmiya was found hanging in her apartment, with relatives alleging frequent disputes and past assaults by Sama, who is reportedly married. The family questions the scene's circumstances, citing an unlatched main door and an open balcony. Police are investigating all angles, awaiting forensic postmortem results.

title: Strait of Hormuz reopens: Middle East oil exports to climb to 4-month high
content: The Strait of Hormuz is reopening, paving the way for Middle Eastern fuel oil exports to reach a four-month high in June. Iraq and Saudi Arabia are leading this surge, with Iraq notably diversifying routes through Syria. While shipments are increasing, they remain below pre-war levels, and cautious optimism prevails due to ongoing negotiation uncertainties. This development follows an interim US-Iran agreement.

title: CBSE class 10 board result: Pass percentage jumped from 29% to 48% in recent years
content: Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is poised to release Class 10 Second Board Results 2026 soon, with lakhs of students eagerly awaiting their scores. This year marks a significant shift with the introduction of a new two-exam system, offering students a second chance to improve their performance. Previous supplementary exam data reveals a notable increase in pass percentages from 2024 to 2025, indicating evolving student outcomes.

title: ITR filing FY 2025-26: Old vs new income tax regime - how salaried taxpayers can lower tax outgo
content: ITR filing FY 2025-26: The two regimes differ fundamentally in structure. The new tax regime offers lower slab rates but largely eliminates exemptions and deductions. The old tax regime, in contrast, allows taxpayers to claim a range of benefits.

title: 33-year-old man found dead in actress Krishi Thapanda's apartment, probe underway
content: A 33-year-old man, Vaishak, was discovered deceased under suspicious circumstances at Kannada actress Krishi Thapanda's Bengaluru apartment. Police confirmed Vaishak knew the actress and had visited her residence on Wednesday night. Thapanda was reportedly out of town. Authorities are investigating the unnatural death, examining CCTV footage, and awaiting the post-mortem report to ascertain the cause.

title: Türkiye’s next-gen unmanned fighter demonstrates precision strike capability
content: Turkey's Bayraktar Kizilelma, a stealthy jet-powered unmanned fighter, has successfully completed firing tests, marking a significant advancement in its drone capabilities. This development builds on the global success of the Bayraktar TB2. Meanwhile, India is developing its own loyal wingman drone, the CATS Warrior, as part of its Combat Air Teaming System program, highlighting a global trend towards manned-unmanned teaming in aerial warfare.

title: 'Mirzapur - The Movie' teaser out: Pankaj Tripathi, Ali Fazal return with 'Bhaukaal'
content: The teaser for 'Mirzapur: The Movie' has finally dropped, offering a thrilling glimpse into the return of fan-favorite characters like Kaleen Bhaiyya and Guddu Bhaiyya. Actors Ali Fazal, Pankaj Tripathi, and Divyenndu are back in action, with Jitendra Kumar reprising his role as Bablu Pandit. Ravi Kishan adds a compelling new presence to the Mirzapur storyline.

title: Venezuela earthquake: 32 killed, over 700 injured; state of emergency declared
content: In the wake of devastating twin earthquakes, Venezuela has declared a national state of emergency. Infrastructure has been severely impacted, with many buildings reduced to rubble and fears of casualties potentially soaring between 10,000 and 100,000, according to the USGS. Rescue operations have been hindered, especially in the capital Caracas and at Maiquetia International Airport, where damage is extensive.

title: Vitiligo is not contagious: Dermatologist urges people to look beyond the skin this World Vitiligo Day
content: Vitiligo is more than just skin deep, often causing significant psychological distress and social stigma.  This autoimmune condition, where pigment-producing cells are attacked, isn't contagious and has no single cause. While a permanent cure remains elusive, early and personalized dermatological treatments offer hope. World Vitiligo Day urges us to focus on empathy, inclusion, and proper care, rather than just the visible appearance of the condition.

title: Scenarios: How can India qualify for T20 World Cup semi-finals?
content: India's Women's T20 World Cup semi-final hopes remain in their own hands, but a recent loss to South Africa has intensified the pressure. With crucial matches against Bangladesh and Australia looming, Harmanpreet Kaur's team must avoid any further slip-ups. Bangladesh, a surprise contender, poses a significant challenge, making a win essential to control their destiny and navigate the complex qualification scenarios.

title: 'Not about him': Rahul Gandhi expresses regret in defamation case by Shivraj Singh's son
content: Rahul Gandhi has approached the Madhya Pradesh High Court, expressing regret over a statement allegedly defaming Kartikeya Singh, son of Union Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan. Gandhi's lawyer submitted an application stating the remark was unrelated to Singh. Kartikeya Singh had filed a defamation complaint in a Bhopal court, leading to a summons for Gandhi. The Congress leader is now seeking to quash these proceedings.

title: Bengaluru to Mumbai: Which Indian cities saw the sharpest rise in home prices?
content: India's property market shows a mixed but upward trend, with residential prices rising 4.5% nationally in Q1 2026. Bengaluru leads with a 13.1% annual surge, while Ludhiana surprisingly recorded the highest jump at 22.2%. Despite a dip in Delhi, most cities experienced growth, indicating a dynamic real estate landscape for buyers and investors.

title: Oil prices fall to $70: Will your flight tickets get cheaper?
content: Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) prices, which had surged, are now under scrutiny as crude oil costs decline. The Civil Aviation Minister indicated the government may ask airlines to reassess surge charges and additional fare components if fuel prices remain stable. Discussions are ongoing with airlines to ascertain the longevity of this price reduction, with a Rs 10,000 crore price stabilization fund already in place to support the sector.

title: Owner paid for repair despite warranty; court orders Mahindra, dealer 34K payout
content: A Himachal Pradesh consumer commission has ordered Mahindra and its dealer to refund over Rs 19,000 to a vehicle owner. The pickup truck broke down, and the owner was forced to pay for repairs despite it being under warranty. The commission found the companies liable for deficiency in service, rejecting their claims of driver abuse and delayed service. The owner also gets compensation for mental agony and litigation costs.

title: 2,004 calls, 238 hours & one final 'signal': How Pune businessman's murder unfolded
content: A chilling conspiracy has emerged in the death of real estate businessman Ketan Agarwal, allegedly orchestrated by his fiancée Siya Goyal and her lover Chetan Chaudhary. Investigators revealed months of secret communication and repeated attempts to lure Agarwal to Lohagad Fort before his fatal fall. CCTV footage and phone records point to a meticulously planned murder, with earlier attempts reportedly failing.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's parents arrive in Belfast ahead of potential India debut
content: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, the youngest ever selected for India's men's team, is poised for a potential international debut against Ireland. His rapid rise, marked by a record-breaking List A fifty and a stellar IPL 2026 season, has generated immense excitement. With his parents present in Belfast, fans eagerly await his first cap, a dream fulfilled for the 15-year-old prodigy.

title: Embracing grey hair may reveal your mindset, self-confidence, and emotional maturity
content: Discovering your first grey hair often sparks a deeper psychological journey.  Research reveals women embracing their natural grey are pushing back against societal stigma, prioritizing authenticity over appearing youthful. This choice signifies a quiet act of self-acceptance and emotional maturity, demonstrating a shift in self-worth away from external validation and towards inner peace.  It's a powerful statement of embracing who you are.

title: Watch: Venezuela, Japan & California shaken by powerful quakes within hours
content: A day of powerful seismic activity saw major earthquakes strike Venezuela, Japan, and California. Venezuela experienced the most devastating impact with twin quakes causing fatalities and building collapses. Japan's northeast coast was hit by a strong tremor, while northern California also registered a significant quake. Experts confirm these events are unrelated, occurring on separate fault lines.

title: NCERT flags circulation of pirated textbooks, fake class IX social science book
content: National Council of Educational Research and Training NCERT has cautioned against circulation of pirated and unauthorised textbooks in print and digital formats across online platforms in India. A fake Class IX Social Science textbook titled Understanding Society India Beyond is being shared on social media, websites and groups. NCERT has advised stakeholders to rely only on official sources including its website ePathshala and authorised vendors, while announcing legal action under Copyright Act 1957 against offenders.

title: ‘Had drinks’: Karnataka tourist ignores warning, swept away while sitting on rocks at Goa beach
content: A tourist's holiday in Goa turned tragic after he ignored safety warnings and his friend's pleas, losing his life at Baga beach. Ashpaq Masali, 34, reportedly consumed alcohol before attempting a daredevil stunt on slippery rocks, only to be swept away by a powerful wave. Despite rescue efforts, his body was later recovered. Authorities had previously advised against venturing near the sea during the monsoon due to hazardous conditions.

title: Trump kicks off ‘Great State Fair’: What America’s 250th anniversary will look like
content: President Trump inaugurated a 16-day celebration for America's 250th anniversary on the National Mall, featuring a "Great American State Fair" with diverse displays and performances. The event promises the world's largest fireworks display on July 4th, alongside athletic competitions and a new Ferris wheel. Despite some performer withdrawals and political sensitivities, the festivities aim to showcase national pride and a revitalized America.

title: Why every homeowner needs a Khata certificate: process, documents & benefits explained
content: Securing a Khata certificate is crucial for all property owners in Karnataka, validating ownership and enabling essential services. This municipal document is mandatory for property tax payments, bank loans, utility connections, and building permits. The process involves submitting required documents and a physical property verification. Obtaining a Khata ensures your property's legal standing and smooth transactions within the civic system.

title: Gujarat Man Loses Rs 6,00,000 In 'APK' Fraud, Jharkhand-Based Gang Arrested
content: The main APK developer, Purnanand alias Mukesh Tiwari, was dramatically arrested from a moving train traveling from Kolkata to Sairang.

title: Google Warned Millions Before Quake Hit Venezuela. Can Your Phone Save You?
content: Google's Android Earthquake Alerts System identified the initial seismic activity and pushed warnings to nearby users.

title: India's New Hub-And-Spoke Aviation Model That Will Cut Travel Time
content: The first service under the hub-and-spoke model, operated by Air India as an "Easy Connect" flight, was launched from Varanasi on Thursday.

title: Amazon CEO Meets PM Modi, To Invest $48 Billion In India Over 4 Years
content: Amazon plans $48 billion investment in India from 2026 to 2030 to expand ecommerce and AI cloud infrastructure.

title: 'Shiva Called Me': Nepal Sadhus Arrive In Jammu For Amarnath Darshan
content: These ascetics have travelled for days, crossing into India through the Bihar border before boarding a train to Jammu.

title: "Enjoy My Pregnancy Fashion": Usha Vance On Her $8 Maternity Dress Analysis
content: Usha, who is pregnant with her fourth child, was featured in a New York Times fashion article titled "The Politics and Power of the Pregnancy Image."

title: Centre's Rs 99,446-Crore Plan Fuels Job Boom: 1.4 Crore Join Formal Economy
content: With an outlay of Rs 99,446 crore, Pradhan Mantri Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana aims to generate over 3.5 crore jobs over two years.

title: 'Mad As A Murder Hornet' Trump Squabbles With Disaffected Senate
content: US Senator John Kennedy, a Louisiana Republican, told reporters that Trump was "mad as a murder hornet" at the war powers vote because it undermined his ongoing negotiations with Iran.

title: US Soldiers Say Injuries From Iran War Were More Serious Than Army Reported
content: The allegations came after Hegseth said that nearly 90% of the 400 American service members injured during the conflict with Iran had suffered only minor injuries and had returned to duty.

title: Explained: What Makes Venezuela Prone To Devastating Earthquakes
content: Many earthquakes in Venezuela are "shallow-focus," meaning they occur less than 15 to 20 kilometres below the ground.

title: 40 Army Personnel Face FIR For Storming J&K Police Station, Assaulting Cops
content: In the FIR, police have alleged that the attack was pre-planned and several policemen have been injured.

title: Venezuela Earthquakes Live: Venezuela's 7.5 Earthquake Is Most Powerful To Hit Country In Over A Century
content: 7.5 Magnitude Earthquake hit Venezuela Live Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.

title: "Nobody's Laughing At Us Anymore": Trump Opens US 250th Birthday Party
content: Surprisingly, Trump wrapped his speech in less than half an hour - making it one of the shortest rally addresses of his second term and perhaps his entire political career.

title: 1 Dead, 4 Missing, Several Injured In Arunachal Flash Floods
content: The search parties are looking for Elesh Marak, Baleri Marak, Tao Angina and Sourav Kumar, while the body of Nirmala Gupta was recovered on Wednesday evening.

title: Angry Over Petrol Price, Men Set Pump Staff On Fire. Father Burnt Saving Him In Madhya Pradesh
content: The victim, identified as Akash Sengar, is critical and undergoing treatment at Jayarogya Hospital, while his father, who rushed to save him, also suffered burn injuries.
